for the 
Tool and Documentation” portion of the page: 
https://www.hcup-us.ahrq.gov/toolssoftware/ccsr/prccsr.jsp. 

CMS used the CCSR v2021.2 software to populate this field. CCSR uses the first three characters to 
indicate which of the 31 clinical domains applies. In the TAF the CCSR was mapped to the OT line 
Procedure Code (variable called LINE_PRCDR_CD) The 31 clinical domains are: 

Abbreviation CCSR Clinical Domain 
ADM = Administration of Therapeutic Substances 
CAR = Cardiovascular
